CheckTitle: Ensure agent blueprints define inheritable permission restrictions
Description: Checks whether agent identity blueprints have inheritablePermissions configured. An empty or unset inheritablePermissions list means there is no declared intent for what permissions agent instances should receive.
Risk: Blueprints without inheritable permission restrictions provide no signal about intended permission scope. This makes permissions review harder and increases the chance of over-provisioning.

Remediation.Recommendation: Configure inheritablePermissions on the blueprint with either enumeratedScopes (explicit list) or noScopes (if agents should not inherit permissions automatically).

SourceNotes: inheritablePermissions is a blueprint-level relationship that controls scope inheritance for agent instances.
